records.question: Which cities in Shanghai have temperatures exactly 18.3 in March, exactly 19.4 in November, at least 20.6 in July and September, at most 20.6 in August, and at most 18.3 in December?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
JOIN temperature ON city.city_id = temperature.city_id
WHERE temperature.sep >= 20.6 AND temperature.jul >= 20.6 AND temperature.mar = 18.3 AND temperature.nov = 19.4 AND city.city = 'Shanghai' AND temperature.dec <= 18.3 AND temperature.aug <= 20.6
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.City_ID FROM city AS T1 INNER JOIN temperature AS T2 ON T1.City_ID = T2.City_ID WHERE T2.Mar = 18.3 AND T2.Nov = 19.4 AND T2.Jul >= 20.6 AND T2.Sep >= 20.6 AND T2.Aug <= 20.6 AND T2.Dec <= 18.3

records.question: Which cities in Wuxi ( Jiangsu ) have a GDP of at most 688.02, a temperature of exactly 21.1 in September, and a temperature of at least 20.6 in June?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
JOIN temperature ON city.city_id = temperature.city_id
WHERE temperature.sep = 21.1 AND temperature.jun >= 20.6 AND city.gdp <= 688.02 AND city.city = 'Wuxi ( Jiangsu )'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.City_ID FROM city AS T1 INNER JOIN temperature AS T2 ON T1.City_ID = T2.City_ID WHERE T1.City = 'Wuxi ( Jiangsu )' AND T1.GDP <= 688.02 AND T2.Sep = 21.1 AND T2.Jun >= 20.6

records.question: What cities with hanyu_pinyin Jīnhuá have January temperatures at most 26.7, March temperatures exactly 27.8, and October temperatures at most 30.6?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
JOIN temperature ON city.city_id = temperature.city_id
WHERE temperature.jan <= 26.7 AND temperature.mar = 27.8 AND city.hanyu_pinyin = 'Jīnhuá' AND temperature.oct <= 30.6
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.City_ID FROM city AS T1 INNER JOIN temperature AS T2 ON T1.City_ID = T2.City_ID WHERE T1.Hanyu_Pinyin = 'Jīnhuá' AND T2.Jan <= 26.7 AND T2.Mar = 27.8 AND T2.Oct <= 30.6

records.question: Which cities named 常州 with hanyu pinyin Chángzhōu and city name Changzhou ( Jiangsu ) have a regional population of at most 4591972 and a GDP of at most 358.04?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
WHERE city.hanyu_pinyin = 'Chángzhōu' AND city.city = 'Changzhou ( Jiangsu )' AND city.hanzi = '常州' AND city.regional_population <= 4591972 AND city.gdp <= 358.04
records.pred_sql: SELECT City_ID FROM city WHERE Hanzi = '常州' AND Hanyu_Pinyin = 'Chángzhōu' AND City = 'Changzhou ( Jiangsu )' AND Regional_Population <= 4591972 AND GDP <= 358.04

records.question: Which cities with hanyu_pinyin Jiāxīng and hanzi 嘉兴/ 嘉興 have a regional population of 4501700, a GDP of exactly 266.81, a January temperature of at least 25.6, and March, June, and November temperatures of exactly 26.6, 28.3, and 27.2?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT city.city_id FROM city
JOIN temperature ON city.city_id = temperature.city_id
WHERE temperature.mar = 26.6 AND temperature.jan >= 25.6 AND city.gdp = 266.81 AND temperature.nov = 27.2 AND city.hanyu_pinyin = 'Jiāxīng' AND city.regional_population = 4501700 AND temperature.jun = 28.3 AND city.hanzi = '嘉兴/ 嘉興'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.City_ID FROM city AS T1 INNER JOIN temperature AS T2 ON T1.City_ID = T2.City_ID WHERE T1.Hanyu_Pinyin = 'Jiāxīng' AND (T1.Hanzi = '嘉兴' OR T1.Hanzi = '嘉興') AND T1.Regional_Population = 4501700 AND T1.GDP = 266.81 AND T2.Jan >= 25.6 AND T2.Mar = 26.6 AND T2.Jun = 28.3 AND T2.Nov = 27.2
